TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Faustin-Archange_Touadéra, title = Faustin-Archange_Touadéra, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Faustin-Archange_Touadéra} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 4, Faustin-Archange Touadéra, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Central african republic ta' misuw hya' ga Faustin-Archange Touadéra, aring ryax tay 30 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 4, Faustin-Archange Touadéra, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Central african republic ta' misuw hya' ga Faustin-Archange Touadéra, aring ryax tay 30 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *aus~ɕtin-arʦ~ʨħaŋe toua**ra, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ʦ~ʨentral a*riʦ~ʨan repuβliʦ~ʨ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *aus~ɕtin-arʦ~ʨħaŋe toua**ra, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
